.view-content.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(168, 153, 132) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(60, 56, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(215, 153, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(60, 56, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(60, 56, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgba(80, 73, 69, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgba(80, 73, 69, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgba(80, 73, 69, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgba(40, 40, 40, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
